subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received and its detailed contents were noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه اخیر رسید و بر مضمون مفصل اطلاع حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @non-participation in politics
